claims.quote: Pharmacy Residency ProgramPharmacy Residency - SarasotaPharmacy Residency - Venice
claims.claimText: Pharmacy Residency Program is split into two location tracks: Pharmacy Residency - Sarasota and Pharmacy Residency - Venice.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Pharmacy residency is a post-degree training program (Tier 2). The two-campus split adds operational detail to A1's program-list claim.
claims.limitations: Index entries only; no eligibility, salary, or audience details on this page.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 consolidated 'Pharmacy Residency Program' but skipped the two sub-location tokens listing Sarasota and Venice campuses immediately after.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: all individuals providing care to vulnerable populations are required to undergo background screening through The Florida Care Provider Background Screening Clearinghouse
claims.claimText: All care providers to vulnerable populations must complete background screening via the Florida Care Provider Background Screening Clearinghouse.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Background-screening requirement applies to anyone providing care at the system, including employed clinicians — a Tier 3 onboarding requirement.
claims.limitations: Statement is system-wide; does not call out trainees or visiting learners specifically.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on program list and recruiting callouts; missed the eligibility/credentialing sentence buried inside the system description paragraph.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: staffed by Sarasota Memorial’s widening range of fellowship-trained oncology specialists and subspecialists and support clinicians with groundbreaking innovations and research

claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Describes staffing model with fellowship-trained subspecialist attendings — Tier 3 practice/career signal, not a training program.
claims.limitations: Descriptive marketing language, not a job posting; no specific physician opening or sponsorship policy stated.
